title: CobbleCraft SMP - Oceanic Adventure
description: Cobblemon in Vanilla Minecraft with a few tweaks.
body:
![Pokemon in Minecraft !](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/548115e5a2ba182e627cb84bfb548c50e42016f5_0.webp)
# GOAL
As a big fan of modded Minecraft, Vanilla Minecraft and Pokemon. I've always wanted to play with a custom modpack and my favorite mods only. I finally managed to find some of my favorite mods compatible with Cobblemon, making for an incredible adventure in both single-player and multiplayer as you wich.

# FEATURING
- Cobblemon - A Minecraft version of Pokemon wich add a lots of mons that have a model as faithfull as possible to Minecraft.
- All the other mods from the Cobblemon official modpack
- Litematica
- Bobby Mod
- Axiom
- Armor Poser
- HandCrafted
- Sophisticated backpacks
- Supplementary
- Simple Voice Chat
- Inventory Profiles Next
- Cobblemons little QoL add-ons
- A few RPG mod adding magics
- AND MANY MORE (See changelog for full list, optimisation mods, etc.)

MOD NON-INCLUDED DUE TO COPYRIGHT REASON (Compatible with the modpack) 
**LINK**:([https://www.patreon.com/Haubna](https://www.patreon.com/Haubna))
- Physic mod PRO that allow realistic water movement (waves, bumpy boat rides, up and down), snow, smoke, block destruction, etc.

# This modpack is best used with the following datapack for an optimal experience:
- Custom Roleplay Data
- Continent
- Dungeon and taverns (DnT) (place datapack in resource pack folder for CMT)
- DnT Jungle Temple and Ocean monument replacement.
- DnT Stronghold Overhaul.
- Structory and Structory Towers
- Explorify
- Incendium
- Cobblemon Loot
- Tidal Town
- True Ending: Ender dragon fight
- NullScape
- More Radical Trainer

## Vannilla Tweaks:
- Anti Creeper and Endermen griefing
- Armored Elytra
- Bat membrane
- Cauldron concret and mud
- Chunk loader
- Confetti creepers
- Custom nether portals
- 2X Shulker shells
- Graves
- Husk drop sand
- Mini blocks
- More effective tools
- More mob heads
- Multiplayer sleeps
- Player drop heads
- Redstone rotation wrench
- Silence mobs
- Silk touch budding amethyst
- Terracota rotation wrench
- Unlock all recipes.
